description: Slim mirror of platformio/platform-*/boards/*.json (Apache-2.0) and platform.json files.

sources.name: platformio/platform-*
sources.note: 37 platform repos; one boards/ directory per platform

note: This branch is bot-pushed only. Direct human edits are blocked by branch protection. To regenerate, run the matching workflow on main: .github/workflows/sync-platformio.yml
